## Analyzers (1)

### [Hunterio_DomainSearch v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Hunterio/Hunterio_domainsearch.json)
hunter.io is a service to find email addresses from a domain.
